nasb.text: Do you not know that we will judge angels? How much more matters of this life?

esv.text: Do you not know that we are to judge angels? How much more, then, matters pertaining to this life!

cnv.text: 你們不知道我們要審判天使嗎？何況今生的事呢？

ccb.text: 岂不知我们将来要审判天使吗？何况今世的事呢？

csbs.text: 难道你们不知道，我们将要审判天使吗？更何况今生的事呢！
